name: Oyako Donburi- Chicken and Egg Dish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan or rice cooker, combine rice and 4 cups water. Cook until rice is tender.
2. Remove the skin and bones from the Chicken breasts.
3. To make stock, simmer the bones in the remaining 4 cups of water for 30 minutes. Strain to remove bones.
4. Remove stems from mushrooms. Cut mushrooms and chicken into thin strips.
5. Add mushrooms, chicken, bamboo shoots, carrots, salt, and MSG to the stock. Simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Gently stir in eggs and green onions. Cook over low heat until eggs begin to set.
7. Serve over rice (serves 6).
